items.titolo: Nvidia and SK hynix ink multi-year memory co-development and supply agreement — seeks to address extended development cycles
items.descrizione: Nvidia and SK hynix have inked a multi-year collaboration agreement under which the companies will co-develop next-generation memory technologies for Nvidia's upcoming platforms and SK hynix will supply them to Nvidia.
